raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Senate Bill 61 will reduce retention from 10 percent to 5 percent for privately financed projects.",
    "Reducing retention will bring financial stability and predictability to contractors statewide.",
    "The new law aligns private sector practices with a successful 5% cap already in place for public works.",
    "Keeping the cash flowing will reduce construction timelines and costs.",
    "The reduction in retention will create a more equitable and stable business environment for small and emerging contractors.",
    "Without the passage of SB 61, contractors will continue to rely on expensive credit lines, driving up construction costs."
  ]
}
```
